summary: pre-1 check failed: task 162 OptionSome/OptionNone variants absent from codebase. Escalated as esc-163-25. No implementation steps taken.

Added OptionSome/OptionNone variants to CompiledExprKind in reify-types, plus walk/collect/remap arms and constructors. Added stub eval_expr arms and option_eval_tests.rs with step-1 tests. Blocked: reify-compiler/src/lib.rs:collect_body_refs_inner() also matches on CompiledExprKind exhaustively and needs OptionSome/OptionNone arms — outside task scope. Escalated.

All 6 steps complete. Fixed reify-compiler collect_body_refs_inner exhaustive match (OptionSome/OptionNone arms). Implemented OptionNone => Value::Option(None) and OptionSome(inner) => Value::Option(Some(Box::new(eval(inner)))) in eval_expr. 12 tests in option_eval_tests.rs all pass. Full reify-expr suite clean.

All 14 steps complete. Added 7 diamond hierarchy test functions covering: single-bound satisfied, missing member single error, default injected once, constraint from root, members at every level, let default deduped, deep 5-level diamond. All 24 trait conformance tests pass. Implementation was complete from task 188 (visited HashSet in collect_all_requirements). No code changes needed.

All 12 plan items complete (pre-1, pre-2, steps 1-10). Created crates/reify-compiler/tests/qualified_access_compile_tests.rs (6 tests) and crates/reify-eval/tests/qualified_access_eval.rs (4 tests). All 10 tests fail RED — parser lacks A::x and expr.(A::x) syntax support despite task 191 being marked done. Tests await task 191/192 implementation to go GREEN.

Create crates/reify-compiler/tests/qualified_access_compile_tests.rs with module imports (reify_compiler::*, reify_types::*) and helper functions compile_module() and compile_first_template() matching the pattern from trait_conformance_tests.rs and trait_merge_tests.rs.; Create crates/reify-eval/tests/qualified_access_eval.rs with imports (reify_compiler, reify_syntax, reify_eval::Engine, reify_constraints::SimpleConstraintChecker, reify_types::{Severity, ModulePath, ValueCellId}) and a parse_compile_check() helper that runs the full pipeline: parse -> compile (assert no errors) -> return compiled module.; Write compiler test `basic_qualified_access_compiles`: trait A{param x:Length}, structure S:A{param x:Length=5mm, let y:Length = A::x}. Assert: no compile errors, template has value cells for both 'x' and 'y'.; Write compiler test `disambiguation_two_traits_same_member`: trait A{param size:Length}, trait B{param size:Length}, structure S:A+B{param size:Length=5mm, let a_size:Length = A::size, let b_size:Length = B::size}. Assert: no compile errors, template has value cells for 'size', 'a_size', and 'b_size'. Both qualified accesses resolve without ambiguity errors.; Write compiler test `error_trait_not_found`: structure S{param x:Length=5mm, let y:Length = UnknownTrait::x}. Assert: error diagnostic containing 'trait' and 'not found' (or 'unknown').; Write compiler test `error_member_not_in_trait`: trait A{param x:Length}, structure S:A{param x:Length=5mm, let y:Length = A::nonexistent}. Assert: error diagnostic mentioning the member name 'nonexistent' and indicating it is not defined in the trait.; Write compiler test `qualified_access_in_constraint_expr`: trait A{param x:Length}, structure S:A{param x:Length=5mm, constraint A::x > 0mm}. Assert: no compile errors, template has at least 1 constraint.; Write compiler test `error_instance_does_not_implement_trait`: trait A{param x:Length}, trait B{param y:Length}, structure Outer{sub inner = Inner, let z:Length = inner.(A::x)}, structure Inner:B{param y:Length=3mm}. Assert: error diagnostic about Inner not implementing trait A (or qualified access resolution failure).; Write eval test `qualified_access_returns_correct_value`: trait A{param x:Length}, structure S:A{param x:Length=5mm, let y:Length = A::x}. Full pipeline parse->compile->eval. Assert: ValueCellId('S','y') evaluates to mm(5.0) = 0.005 SI.; Write eval test `qualified_access_in_constraint_satisfied`: trait A{param x:Length}, structure S:A{param x:Length=5mm, constraint A::x > 0mm}. Full pipeline parse->compile->check. Assert: constraint result is Satisfied (5mm > 0mm).; Write eval test `qualified_access_in_constraint_violated`: trait A{param x:Length}, structure S:A{param x:Length=5mm, constraint A::x > 10mm}. Full pipeline parse->compile->check. Assert: at least one constraint result is Violated (5mm < 10mm).; Write eval test `instance_qualified_access_basic`: trait A{param x:Length}, structure Inner:A{param x:Length=3mm}, structure Outer{sub part = Inner, let val:Length = part.(A::x)}. Full pipeline parse->compile->eval. Assert: ValueCellId('Outer','val') evaluates to mm(3.0) = 0.003 SI.

Root cause identified: commit c88ca963 caused catastrophic regression — stash-restore accidentally overwrote source files. Removed QualifiedAccess/InstanceQualifiedAccess from reify-syntax/src/lib.rs and ts_parser.rs (grammar lowering), tree-sitter grammar (:: syntax), and reify-compiler/src/lib.rs (compiler handling). Also deleted 9+ test files unrelated to task 193. ALL 6 compiler tests fail with parse errors because the grammar no longer supports :: syntax. Fix requires restoring code in reify-syntax and tree-sitter-reify (outside task 193 scope). Escalated as esc-193-39.
Debug fix for: Failures: tests failed

Committed restoration of 61 damaged files (3e7d6c65). Fixed sub-component syntax bug in both test files: `sub inner = Inner` → `sub inner = Inner()` and `sub part = Inner` → `sub part = Inner()` (fbbce2be). Compiler tests verified: 5 fail RED (awaiting task 192 impl), 1 passes (error_instance_does_not_implement_trait). Eval tests unrunnable: reify-kernel-occt build fails because loft_two_profiles() has wrong body (copy-paste of make_circle_face with undeclared radius/z_height variables). Escalated as esc-193-40.
